tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are inviting me to Echo tonight, but my midterm is tomorrow at 9am with only 60% of review done. I need to decide whether to prioritize studying or socializing.
Mina accepted the Echo invitation. With only 60% of midterm review done and a deadline tomorrow, I must now weigh attending the party against studying.
Midterm study progress improved to 78%, but I missed the club night window. Energy remains high enough to continue reviewing before sleep.
The club is welcoming me, yet my midterm review is incomplete. I must decide whether to join them or continue studying tonight.
I slept well, restoring my energy to 10.0 with zero sleep debt. Now I must choose between attending the Echo party or finishing my incomplete midterm review.
Midterm study is now complete at 100%, and the exam has already begun. No further action is required.
The club welcomes me, but my midterm is already done. I feel relaxed and ready for the Echo party.

agent.last_reasoning: Exam deadline passed; club event already completed. Sleeping recovers energy for Sunday laundry.
